title: soldanella hungarica var. minor
intro: Soldanella hungarica var. minor, also known as Hungarian soldanella or lesser soldanella, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. Soldanella hungarica var. minor has been reported to have various health benefits, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. In traditional herbal preparations, soldanella is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
